# ZenBrain

> Neuroscience-inspired, zero-dependency memory system for AI agents. Implements
> spaced repetition (FSRS), Hebbian learning, Ebbinghaus forgetting curves,
> emotional memory tagging, sleep consolidation, and Bayesian confidence
> propagation across a 7-layer memory architecture. TypeScript, dual ESM/CJS,
> tree-shakeable. Apache-2.0.

ZenBrain is not a vector database with a memory label — it is a set of
principled, cited, inspectable algorithms for how memory should behave over
time: what to strengthen, what to forget, and how confident to be. The open
package (`@zensation/algorithms` + `@zensation/core`) ships 20 algorithm
modules (10 core + 10 advanced) plus a `MemoryCoordinator` orchestrating the
seven layers (Working, Short-Term, Episodic, Semantic, Procedural, Core,
Cross-Context).

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/README.md): overview, comparison to Mem0/Letta/Zep, quick start, all 20 algorithms with runnable snippets.
- [Architecture](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): the 7-layer memory model and how data flows between layers.
- [API Reference](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/docs/api-reference.md): full function signatures per module.
- [FAQ](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/docs/FAQ.md): common questions and design-decision rationale.
- [Benchmarks](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/docs/benchmarks.md): FSRS vs. SM-2 retention accuracy and related results.
- [Roadmap](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md): released versions and planned/exploratory directions.
- [Getting Started](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): install and first steps.
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/AGENTS.md): conventions for coding agents contributing to this repo (project map, non-negotiables, test commands).

## Examples

- [Basic chatbot](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/examples/basic-chatbot.ts)
- [LangChain integration](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/examples/with-langchain.ts)
- [CrewAI integration](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/examples/with-crewai.ts)
- [Vercel AI SDK integration](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/examples/with-vercel-ai.ts)
- [Claude integration](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/examples/with-claude.ts)
- [Live in-browser playground](https://zensation.ai/en/playground): runs the published code with no install.

## Packages

- [`@zensation/algorithms`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@zensation/algorithms): the 20 zero-dependency algorithm modules, usable standalone.
- [`@zensation/core`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@zensation/core): `MemoryCoordinator` + the 7 memory layers, built on `@zensation/algorithms`.
- `@zensation/adapter-postgres`, `@zensation/adapter-sqlite`: storage adapters for `@zensation/core`.

## Optional

- [Research](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain#research): arXiv preprint, Zenodo DOI, TDCommons technical disclosure, BibTeX citation.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): how to open issues and PRs.
- [Changelog](https://github.com/zensation-ai/zenbrain/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history.
